Our Mission

WE BUILD FOR
REAL ATHLETES,
NOT TRENDS.

VITALIQUE was born out of frustration. The frustration of buying gym accessories that looked great online, but fell apart during your second week of serious training. Products designed for the aesthetic, not the athlete.

We started VITALIQUE Nutrition Ltd with one clear mandate: build products that can keep up with serious training. Products that perform under pressure, survive real gym environments, and support the lifestyles of people who take their bodies seriously.

Every item in our lineup is stress-tested, athlete-reviewed, and built to standards that far exceed what you'll find in mainstream fitness retail. We don't chase trends. We build tools.

From hydration systems to recovery gear, from meal prep solutions to lifting accessories, VITALIQUE exists at the intersection of elite performance and everyday usability. You deserve equipment that earns its place in your gym bag.

⚡

Performance First

Every design decision is driven by how it performs during training, not how it looks in a flat lay.

🛡

Built to Last

We use materials that survive real-world training — stainless steel, reinforced seams, industrial-grade hardware.

🏆

Athlete Reviewed

Tested by competitive athletes before launch. Every single time. No exceptions.

♻

Responsible Sourcing

Committed to sustainable materials and ethical manufacturing across our entire supply chain.

Founded

Who We Are

THE GEAR BEHIND
EVERY GREAT
SESSION.

VITALIQUE Nutrition Ltd is a UK-based performance accessories brand built by athletes for athletes. We began as a small team of coaches, personal trainers, and competitive lifters who were tired of overpriced gear that underdelivered.

Our founding principle was simple: if it can't survive your hardest training day, we won't sell it. This ethos runs through every product — from the reinforced stitching on our IronCore Duffel to the pressure-seal lid on our UltraMix Shaker.

Today, VITALIQUE products are used by personal trainers, competitive bodybuilders, marathon runners, yoga instructors, and weekend warriors across the UK. Our community is united by one thing: the relentless drive to do better.

We take pride in honest, transparent product descriptions. No inflated claims. No misleading marketing. Just well-engineered accessories that make your training life easier, more consistent, and more enjoyable.

01

Quality Without Compromise

We source only premium-grade materials. Our stainless steel products are food-grade and BPA-free. Our fabrics are abrasion-resistant and wash-tested. Quality is not a feature — it's the baseline of everything we make.

02

Transparency Always

We don't hide behind marketing language. We tell you exactly what each product is made of, who it's for, and what it will and won't do. Our customers make informed decisions — and they keep coming back because of it.

03

Community-Driven

Every new product is shaped by feedback from our community. We survey, we listen, we iterate. Our roadmap is built from the gym floor up — not from a boardroom far removed from real training.

Why Athletes Choose Vitalique

🚚

Fast UK Delivery

Orders dispatched within 2 business days. Free delivery on orders over £50. Tracked shipping on every single order, UK-wide.

🔄

30-Day Returns

Not satisfied? Return within 30 days, no questions asked. We stand behind every product we sell — your satisfaction is our reputation.

🏅

Athlete Tested

Every product undergoes real-world testing with our network of gym professionals and competitive athletes before launch. No guesswork.

💬

Expert Support

Our team includes personal trainers and nutrition specialists. We advise on how to get the most from every product you purchase from us.

What Athletes Say

REAL RESULTS.
REAL FEEDBACK.

★★★★★

The IronCore Duffel is the best gym bag I've ever owned. Eight months of daily use — two sessions a day in some weeks — and it looks as solid as the day it arrived. The compartments are exactly where they should be.

I've gone through so many shakers over the years. The UltraMix is the first one that has never leaked — even thrown loose in a bag. The mixing is genuinely smooth, no clumps, no residue. Worth every penny and then some.
